descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 51 For Sale 2024 | 6 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

If you are in the market for a spacious, modern catamaran, the Lagoon 51 For Sale 2024 offers a solid package for comfortable cruising or private charters. This yacht, launched in 2024, stands as a testament to Lagoon’s refined approach to long-distance sailing and onboard quality of life. She is presented in good condition, has been privately owned, and carries the Bulgarian flag. With a notable array of recent equipment and amenities, she is ready for new adventures at sea.

Key Specifications of Lagoon 51 For Sale 2024:

  • Boat Type: Sail Catamaran
  • Year Built: 2024
  • Flag: Bulgarian (Private)
  • VAT: Not paid
  • Cabins: 6 double
  • Heads: 4
  • Berths: 12
  • Length Overall: 15.35 m
  • Beam: 8.1 m
  • Draft: 1.4 m
  • Engines: 2 x Yanmar 80hp (660 hours as of October 2025)
  • Fuel Tank: 1040 litres
  • Water Tank: 830 litres
  • Deck Equipment: Electric windlass (Lewmar) with remote, dinghy & outboard
  • Electronics: Full Raymarine suite, Autopilot (P70 ACU-400), GPS, plotter
  • Generator: Onan 11 kWa (50 hours as of October 2025)
  • Watermaker: Aquabase 150lt/hr
  • Comfort: Air conditioning throughout, electric fridge, grill, microwave, air fryer, Delonghi coffee maker
  • Entertainment: Sound system (radio, MP3, outside speakers), cinema projector
  • Other: Bimini, deck shower
  • Onboard Capacity: 12 people

This Lagoon 51 For Sale 2024 balances performance, liveability, and practical features, making her a reliable candidate for anyone seeking a recently built catamaran in good condition. Whether for long cruises or coastal explorations, she is set up for immediate use and awaits her next owner. Contact Us Now!
